processors.dqlScript: parse rqBody, "JSON:json" | fieldsFlatten json | parse json.additionalFields, "JSON:additionalFields" | fieldsFlatten json.additionalFields, prefix:"additionalfields."

fieldsAdd json.auditAction = coalesce(json.auditAction, json.action, action, event.type), json.pagePath = coalesce(json.pagePath, additionalfields.path, page), json.targetPath = coalesce(json.targetPath, additionalfields.path), json.userEmail = coalesce(json.userEmail, userEmail), json.userName = coalesce(json.userName, userName), json.feature = coalesce(json.feature, feature)
